fields.name: thinking_reached
fields.label: Thinking reached
fields.value: Whether to paint the back stairwell wall white before the first show. A clean white ground would improve how work reads — the existing wall colour is non-standard and uneven. But colour-matching is difficult and doing it properly means painting the whole wall. There's appetite to make it look right but also appetite to just get started and see what it looks like.

fields.name: blocking
fields.label: Blocking
fields.value: Scope and cost of a full repaint unclear. Colour-matching what's there is hard. Don't want to make it a blocker for getting started.

fields.name: next_action
fields.label: Next action
fields.value: Start without painting. Assess after first installation. Revisit if the wall reads badly against the work.
